variants.name: 异能者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚（即使你死亡的当晚），你查看魔典并选择一个角色，一个提示标记，一名玩家：恶魔得知你的三个选择。
variants.firstNightReminder: 唤醒异能者，让他看魔典，然后让他做出选择，然后告诉恶魔。
variants.otherNightReminder: 唤醒异能者，让他看魔典，然后让他做出选择，然后告诉恶魔。

variants.name: 异能者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚（即使你死亡的当晚），你查看魔典并选择一个角色，一个提示标记，一名玩家：恶魔得知你的三个选择。
variants.firstNightReminder: Show the Esper the Grimoire. They select a character, a reminder, and a player by placing their Character, Reminder, and Player reminders by them. Wake the Demon; show them the marked character, reminder token, and point to the marked player.
variants.otherNightReminder: Show the Esper the Grimoire. They select a character, a reminder, and a player by placing their Character, Reminder, and Player reminders by them. Wake the Demon; show them the marked character, reminder token, and point to the marked player.
